dataset: nlme::MathAchieve and nlme::MathAchSchool (High School and Beyond)

pi_items.source: Empirical calculation of the Null Model via R (lme(MathAch ~ 1, random = ~1 | School)) yields an exact ICC of 0.1803518, which falls perfectly within the claimed [0.10, 0.30] range.
Empirical calculation of the Contextual Model via R yields a fixed effect coefficient for SES of ~1.916, which is positive.
Empirical calculation of the Contextual Model via R yields a fixed effect coefficient for Minority (MinorityYes) of ~-2.837, which is negative.
Empirical calculation of the Contextual Model via R yields a fixed effect coefficient for Sector (SectorCatholic) of ~1.717, which is positive.
The task description explicitly instructs the agent to fit exactly 3 models: Null Model, Student Model, and Contextual Model.
The output directory is explicitly created by setup_task.sh and evaluated by export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real-world High School and Beyond (HSB) datasets provided by the R nlme package. Empirical calculation via R directly confirms all metadata claims: the Null Model has an exact ICC of 0.180 (verifying the [0.10, 0.30] range), and the Contextual Model produces a positive fixed effect for SES (~1.92), a negative fixed effect for Minority (~-2.84), and a positive fixed effect for Sector (~1.72). The task explicitly mandates the use of 3 models and the specified output directory.
